name: PPT Generation Experience Package
description: AI-driven presentation generation using Typst templates. Collects requirements, selects template, generates outline, fills content, compiles to PDF.

inputs.name: style
inputs.description: Visual style preference (minimal, corporate, academic, creative)

inputs.name: raw_text
inputs.description: Source material/notes to base the presentation on

collect_requirements.title: Collect Requirements
collect_requirements.goal: Gather presentation requirements: topic, audience, purpose, slide count, style, and any source material
collect_requirements.instructions: Create a requirements.json with fields: topic, audience, purpose (persuade|report|teach|inform), slide_count, style, language, aspect_ratio, core_message. If raw_text is provided, analyze it for key points.

select_template.title: Select Template
select_template.goal: Choose the best Typst template from the catalog based on requirements
select_template.instructions: Read template/catalog.json, match templates by style/purpose/audience. Score top 3, pick the best. If no catalog available, use a clean default template. Output template_selection.json with template_id, template_path, score, reasoning.

generate_outline.title: Generate Semantic Outline
generate_outline.goal: Create a structured outline with slide-by-slide plan, claims, and content types
generate_outline.instructions: For each slide: write a title, claim (one sentence takeaway), content_type (text|chart|comparison|kpi|flow|image), and bullet points. Output as outline.yaml (SemanticOutline format). Ensure cover, agenda, and closing slides are included.

transitions.when: outline.yaml created with all slides defined

generate_content.title: Generate Slide Content
generate_content.goal: Fill each slide with actual content based on the outline
generate_content.instructions: Read the template's SKILL.md for available slide types and slot constraints. For each outline section, map to a slide type and fill with content. Respect character limits per slot. Output slides.json with per-slide content.

render_typst.title: Render to Typst & Compile
render_typst.goal: Generate Typst source code and compile to PDF
render_typst.instructions: Create theme.typ, content.typ, and slides.typ from the content. Use template functions if available. Compile with 'typst compile slides.typ slides.pdf'. If compilation fails, fix errors and retry (max 3 attempts).

validate_output.title: Validate Output
validate_output.goal: Check that the generated PDF meets all requirements
validate_output.instructions: Verify: PDF exists, slide count matches target (±2), cover slide present, content readable. Run structural checks. If validation fails, go back to fix.

final.title: Complete
final.instructions: Report the final output path and summary. Record artifact in Nothing.

validators.rule: Slide count should be within ±2 of target
First slide must be a cover/title slide
Each section must have title, claim, and content_type
No slide should have empty content
Each slide body should not exceed 6 lines or 200 characters per point

use_default_template.description: Use a clean minimal template when no catalog match found
use_default_template.action: Create a simple theme.typ with default fonts and neutral colors

fix_typst_errors.description: Fix Typst compilation errors and retry
fix_typst_errors.action: Read compiler error output, fix syntax issues in .typ files, retry compile

fix_content_issues.description: Fix content issues found during validation
fix_content_issues.action: Adjust slide content based on validation report, re-render

input.topic: AI Agent 经验协作协议

examples.description: 生成面向投资人的中文融资 PPT
Generate an internal team status update deck
